                      +-------------------------------------------------------+             +---------------------------------------------+
                      |  Service Layer                                        |             |  Data Layer                                 |
                      |                                                       |             |                                             |
                      |                                  +-----------------+  |             |                             /------------\  |
                      |                          +------>|  Order Service  +--o-------------o---------------------------->|  Order DB  ++ |
+---------------+     |  +----------------+      |       +-----------------+  |             |                             \------------/| |              +--------------------+
|  API Gateway  +-----o->|  User Service  +------+                            |             |                                           +-o------------->|  Response Builder  |
+---------------+     |  +----------------+      |                            |             |  /-----------\                            | |              +--------------------+
                      |                          +----------------------------o-------------o->|  User DB  +----------------------------+ |
                      |                                                       |             |  \-----------/                              |
                      |                                                       |             |                                             |
                      |                                                       |             |                                             |
                      +-------------------------------------------------------+             +---------------------------------------------+
